title: melilotus elegans var. barcinonensis
intro: Melilotus elegans var. barcinonensis, also known as yellow melilot, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of yellow melilot are said to include the reduction of symptoms associated with menopausal hot flashes, improved digestion, and relief from anxiety and insomnia. Yellow melilot can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
